projectDescription: A browser-based GitHub discovery tool that ranks open-source repositories by quality signals and generates AI-powered summaries to help developers find the best projects for any niche.
keyFeatures: Smart GitHub repository discovery with multi-signal quality ranking
AI-generated one-sentence summaries for top repositories via Groq LLM
Repo Score (0–100) with letter grades (S/A/B/C/D) based on stars, activity, docs, and relevance
Advanced filters: language, minimum stars, last updated, fork exclusion
Quick search suggestions for common developer niches
Sort results by Score, Stars, or Recent activity
Client-side Groq API key management stored in localStorage
publicApiSurface: search() — triggers GitHub API search with current query and filter state
scoreRepo(repo, query) — scores a repository 0–100 using multi-signal algorithm
scoreGrade(score) — converts numeric score to letter grade (S/A/B/C/D)
generateAISummaries(repos, query) — calls Groq API to generate per-repo summaries
quickSearch(q) — pre-fills the query input and runs a search
sortBy(type) — re-renders results sorted by 'score', 'stars', or 'recent'
toggleFilters() — shows/hides the advanced filter panel
saveKey() / showKeyModal() — manages Groq API key via localStorage
